features.name: variable-length reg declaration inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a reg declaration with variable bit-range width declared inside a generate for loop, where the reg width is parameterized by the loop variable

features.name: partial select with variable bounds in concatenation
features.description: Code should include a partial select expression with variable bounds used inside a concatenation, such as p[i:0] where i is a genvar

features.name: reduction operator on concatenation with genvar-driven expressions
features.description: Code should include a unary reduction operator applied to a concatenation containing genvar-driven variable expressions
